_comment: ADOPTER: the standing pre-authorization for the routine-change lane (HG-0013), mounted as docs/governance/routine-envelope.json and OWNED in CODEOWNERS by the second line (a CONTROL_TARGET — the agent uses it, never edits it). It lets a NARROW class of low-risk changes auto-merge without per-change human review, for a BOUNDED time. A routine change INHERITS this envelope instead of being individually classified — approval moves from per-change to per-envelope, it never disappears. Anything outside it RE-EVALUATES to the normal human-merge lane. The FLOOR denylist in scripts/routine-change-check.mjs is ABSOLUTE and beats every field here: no envelope can authorize a change to the control plane, the API contract, auth, or migrations. Keep the scope tight — widen it only with a second-line decision, and let it expire.
